text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
Well, look whose birthday it is. I've got something
for you.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
A present, huh? I don't suppose it's monetary in
nature?

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: Hah, as if you're the type who'd be happy with some cash in your card. No, this is a very special game.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
Last time was poker, before that was pool, and
we're standing at one win each, right? So...

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
Next is baccarat, a game where you go all in on
luck. The prize is a whole day of the other's time.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
It's only luck, but still... that alone could turn my
day into a blessing—or a curse.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Heh, haha! Ahahaha! Yeah, now that's the best
kind of game to play on my birthday!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
And what a game. All right, this'll be a party of
pure insanity!

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
Damn, that really got your blood flowing. You're
the only person I know who'd be happy getting a
present like this.
